heading: Reports not evidence in civil actions for damages
label: 20903 Reports not evidence in civil actions for damages
text: No part of an accident or incident report filed by a railroad carrier under or made by the Secretary of Transportation under may be used in a civil action for damages resulting from a matter mentioned in the report.section 20901 of this titlesection 20902 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2090345:41., .May 6, 1910, ch. 208, § 436 Stat. 351The words “civil action” are substituted for “suit or action” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.
